coreJobStatement: Design, manufacture, and deliver powered earthmoving, lifting, compaction, and drilling equipment that repositions terrain, lifts loads, and prepares ground at construction, mining, and infrastructure job sites
outputTypes: Foundation drilling rigs (Kelly bar + rotary drive)
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what process steps and equipment compose the construction equipment manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~$225B global (2024); CAGR ~3-6% through 2030. Caterpillar 16% share ($37.8B revenue), Komatsu 10.7% ($28.5B), XCMG, Volvo CE, Liebherr, Hitachi, Doosan, SANY [SRC: web_search]

l6Systems.name: Structural Steel Fabrication
l6Systems.jobFamily: Cut, form, weld, and stress-relieve steel structural assemblies (boom, arm, frame, undercarriage) to design geometry and strength specification

l6Systems.name: Hydraulic System Manufacturing
l6Systems.jobFamily: Manufacture pumps, cylinders, valves, and hose assemblies that convert engine power to working force

l6Systems.name: Drivetrain & Undercarriage
l6Systems.jobFamily: Assemble track chain, rollers, motors, final drives, and pivot components for ground contact and propulsion

l6Systems.name: Cab & Operator Interface
l6Systems.jobFamily: Fabricate ROPS/FOPS cab structure, install controls, displays, and HVAC for operator station

l6Systems.name: Machine Assembly & Integration
l6Systems.jobFamily: Integrate structural, hydraulic, drivetrain, and cab subsystems into complete machine

l6Systems.name: Surface Treatment & Painting
l6Systems.jobFamily: Shot blast, prime, and liquid-paint all structural and cosmetic surfaces for corrosion protection

l6Systems.name: Testing & Commissioning
l6Systems.jobFamily: Load test, pressure test, and commission completed machine to OEM specification

l6Systems.name: Quality & Metrology
l6Systems.jobFamily: CMM dimensional inspection, weld NDE, and process audit across all core steps

l6Systems.name: Engineering & Design
l6Systems.jobFamily: FEA, CAD, welding procedure qualification, and design-for-manufacturing across all programs

vnUnits.name: Steel Input Materials
vnUnits.functionalJob: Steel profiles, plate stock, hollow sections, and forgings for structural fabrication. ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION — boom/arm chord profiles, slide guide channels, pivot pin blanks, frame cross-members, wear strips.

vnUnits.name: CNC Plate Cutting Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Laser cutting head, plasma torch assembly, gantry drive for plate stock preparation.

vnUnits.name: Press Brakes & Plate Rolls
vnUnits.functionalJob: CNC back-gauge, hydraulic ram & tooling for plate forming operations.

vnUnits.name: Welding Equipment
vnUnits.functionalJob: Wire feeder, power source, and robot arm for structural weld fabrication of boom/arm/frame assemblies.

vnUnits.name: Pivot Pins & Bushings
vnUnits.functionalJob: Precision pivot pin blank, bronze/steel bushing, and retention hardware. ZOLLERN SECONDARY POSITION — cold-drawn alloy steel pivot pin blanks.

vnUnits.name: Hydraulic Pumps
vnUnits.functionalJob: Piston/barrel assembly, swashplate & servo control for hydraulic power generation.

vnUnits.name: Hydraulic Cylinders
vnUnits.functionalJob: Cylinder barrel tube, piston rod, end cap, and sealing assembly for linear actuation.

strategicPosition: ZOLLERN PRIMARY at L5 Steel Input Materials under L6a Structural Steel Fabrication. SECONDARY at L5 Pivot Pins & Bushings under L6c Drivetrain & Undercarriage. Supplies boom/arm chord profiles (S355/S690), IH slide guide channels (C60/100Cr6), cold-drawn pivot pin blanks (42CrMo4), frame cross-members, and wear strip profiles.

sources.label: Global Construction Equipment Market — Industry Reports
